settings.title: Packaged model
settings.text: A Business-In-A-Box is a structured opportunity with positioning, target customers, revenue models, launch notes, and optional product or service packages.

settings.title: Package level
settings.text: Buyers can compare starter kits, launch support, custom build pathways, and advisory support depending on budget and timing.

settings.title: Fit and launch
settings.text: The enquiry pathway helps confirm fit, readiness, delivery requirements, and the practical next step.

settings.heading: Understand Business-In-A-Box opportunities
settings.text: Learn how packaged business concepts work, what is usually included, and how to choose between templates, launch packages, and managed build support.
